---
title: "USPAS BPISC 2026"
listing:
  type: table
  sort: false
  contents: 
    - /lectures/plasma
    - /lectures/envelope
    - /lectures/current-limits
    - /lectures/halo
    - /lectures/collision
    - title: "Transverse Particle Dynamics"
      path: "https://people.frib.msu.edu/~lund/uspas/bpisc_2020//lec_set_02/tpd.pdf"
      author: Steven Lund
---
